Finding.Description: Typo in High-Level Requirement name HL-MAP-2.2: "Cell Clasification" should be "Cell Classification" for consistency and traceability.
Finding.Solution: Rename HL-MAP-2.2 Name to "Cell Classification" and propagate the corrected name to all references and tooling that consume HL names.

Finding.Description: Localization and Pose Estimation (LL-LOC-7.1) has dependencies on multiple LL requirements (LL-EXPL-1.1, LL-INTERF-6.1, LL-MAP-2.1). Review the dependency graph to ensure there is a clear, acyclic order and avoid potential circular constraints.
Finding.Solution: Audit the dependency relationships for LL-LOC-7.1. Ensure prerequisites exist before localization starts and adjust dependencies to reflect a clean bootstrap sequence (e.g., confirm LL-EXPL-1.1/LL-EXPL-1.2, LL-MAP-2.1, and LL-INTERF-6.1 are satisfied prior to localization).

Finding.Description: Possible redundancy in LL-LOC-7.1: it both refines HL-EXPL-1.1 and depends on LL-EXPL-1.1. This could blur traceability and introduce unnecessary coupling.
Finding.Solution: Decide on a single trace mechanism: either retain the Refines relationship to HL-EXPL-1.1 and remove the LL-EXPL-1.1 dependency, or keep the LL-EXPL-1.1 dependency and remove the Refines relationship. Align with overall traceability strategy.
